dict.string: Reverie uses Face ID to protect your personal data, goals, and journeys when the app is locked.
Reverie needs access to your calendar to show events alongside your tasks and help you plan your day better.
Reverie needs access to your contacts to help you quickly add participants to journeys and expenses. Your contacts stay private and are only used when you explicitly select them.
Reverie uses Siri to help you quickly add tasks using voice commands like "Add buy milk to Reverie".
Reverie needs access to your photo library to attach photos to your tasks and journeys.
Reverie needs permission to save photos to your photo library.
Reverie needs access to your camera to take photos for your tasks and journeys.
Reverie uses speech recognition to transcribe your voice when capturing tasks and chatting with Lumina.
Reverie needs access to your microphone to record voice input for tasks and conversations with Lumina.
